zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd於1474年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Sheriff of Gloucester John Alexander Walshe 2nd25歲，母親Elizabeth Ann Forster19歲。他於1496年1月25日與Lady Anne Poyntz在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他去世於1547年6月在英國達勒姆享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: Walsh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, Dermot, John Patrick, Kieran, Declan, Eamonn, Colm, Donal, Seamus, Siobhan, Brennan.

English and Irish: ethnic name from Middle English walshe (Old English wælisc) ‘foreign, Welsh’. This form of the name was generally more common than Welsh , especially in Ireland, where it originally denoted a Welsh-speaking immigrant, in particular any of the Welshmen who arrived in the wake of Strongbow's Anglo-Norman invasion of 1170. In Ireland it is sometimes also a translation of Breathnach ‘Briton’.
English: in Yorkshire and Lancashire the name is sometimes a shortened form of   Walshaw  .

variants.name: Walshe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eoin, Murph.
English and Irish: variant of   Walsh  .

variants.name: McBratney
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Breatnaigh ‘son of the Briton’ (referring to the Welsh of Strathclyde). Compare Walsh and Galbraith .

variants.name: Welsh
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish: ethnic name from Middle English welshe (Old English wēalisc, wēlisc) ‘foreign, Welsh’, for someone from Wales or a speaker of the Welsh language. Compare Walsh and Wallace .
Americanized form of Ukrainian and Jewish (from Ukraine) Voloshin or its Polish variant Wołoszyn (see Woloszyn ).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd was born in 1474, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sheriff of Gloucester John Alexander Walshe 2nd, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Ann Forster, was 19. He married Lady Anne Poyntz on 25 January 1496, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. He died in June 1547, in Durham, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd est né en 1474, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sheriff of Gloucester John Alexander Walshe 2nd, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ann Forster, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Poyntz le 25 janvier 1496, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en juin 1547, à Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd 1474 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sheriff of Gloucester John Alexander Walshe 2nd 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Ann Forster 19. it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd è nato il nel 1474 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sheriff of Gloucester John Alexander Walshe 2nd, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Ann Forster, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Poyntz il 25 gennaio 1496, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel giugno 1547, nel Durham, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rdが1474年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sheriff of Gloucester John Alexander Walshe 2ndは25歳，母Elizabeth Ann Forsterは19歳であった。1496年1月25日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでLady Anne Poyntzと結婚した。彼は1547年6月にイギリスダルハムで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd(이)가 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sheriff of Gloucester John Alexander Walshe 2nd(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Ann Forster(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1496년 1월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Lady Anne Poyntz(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1547년 6월 영국 뒤람에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Alexander Walsh 3rd родился в 1474 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sheriff of Gloucester John Alexander Walshe 2nd было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ann Forster, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Poyntz 25 января 1496 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер июнь 1547 г. в местности дурам, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.
